nasb.text: And He said to them, “This is My blood of the covenant, which is poured out for many.

esv.text: And he said to them, “This is my blood of the  covenant, which is poured out for many.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“這是我的血，是為立約的，為許多人流出來的。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“这是我为万人所流的立约之血。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“这是我的血，是为立约的，为许多人所流的。
